final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing surrealist dreamscape illustration with philosophical weight and visual impact.

Style/medium: needs a 超现实主义 surrealist aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a grand, multi-layered vertical dreamscape composition — exact framing and spatial arrangement are yours
Subject: must include all of the following surrealist elements:
  - a colossal moon rising from the ocean surface
  - whales flying through the sky
  - melting clocks
  - a staircase ascending into the clouds
Scene/backdrop: must include an ocean surface as the base plane, with sky and clouds extending upward
Lighting/mood: needs a philosophical, otherworldly dream atmosphere — exact light quality and mood treatment are yours
Color palette: needs a direction evoking dreamlike depth and visual tension — exact hues and tonal ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
